name: Dark Catapulter
name_jp: ダーク・カタパルター
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, if this card is in Defense Position: Place 1 counter on this card. You can banish cards in your GY equal to the number of counters on this card, then target that many Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them, then remove all counters from this card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, if this card is in Defense Position: Place 1 counter on this card. You can banish cards in your GY equal to the number of counters on this card, then target that many Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them, then remove all counters from this card.
eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, if this card is in Defense Position: Place 1 counter on this card. You can banish cards in your GY equal to the number of counters on this card, then target that many Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them, then remove all counters from this card.
